title: An Empire in Peril
overview: A retrofuturistic sci-fi mockumentary from the 29th century, chronicling humanity’s final stand against a galaxy-dominating alien AI. Stylistically unique, it blends analog visuals, liminality, and military realism into a 55-minute feature reminiscent of the early 2000's History Channel TV specials.
